title: IDOR (Insecure Direct Object Reference)
description: Attackers exploit vulnerabilities in the application's authorization mechanisms to access resources or perform actions that they are not authorized to perform by manipulating identifiers (e.g., user IDs, object IDs) in URLs or API requests.
attack_vector: Lack of proper authorization checks when accessing resources based on user-supplied identifiers.
mitigations: Implement robust authorization controls to verify that users have the necessary permissions to access specific resources.
Avoid using direct object references in URLs or API requests; instead, use indirect references or tokens.
Regularly review and test authorization mechanisms to identify and address potential vulnerabilities.
